# The Plague

*[Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) · 1947*

A novel in which an epidemic strikes the city of Oran and tests its inhabitants, foremost among them Doctor Rieux. [Camus](../philosophers/camus.md) refuses any justification of suffering, setting against Father Paneloux's sermon the concrete, solidary struggle against the scourge.
